title: Lab 07: Cron Scheduling
description: Schedule a recurring task for a specific user.

tasks.title: Create user ferro if it does not exist and set its
tasks.prompt: Create user ferro if it does not exist and set its password to cinder9.

tasks.title: Configure a cron job for ferro that runs every 2
tasks.prompt: Configure a cron job for ferro that runs every 2 minutes and logs the message "Lab 07 running" with logger.

checks.original_command: systemctl is-enabled crond | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active crond | grep -qx active
checks.command: systemctl is-enabled crond | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active crond | grep -qx active
